author: fwyzard
body:
- update CUDA to version 13.3.0
    - drop the Volta (sm 7.0) architecture, that is not supported by CUDA 13
    - backport NVIDIA/cccl#8771 from the main branch
- update cuDNN to version 9.23.0.39
- update GDRCopy to version 2.6
- patch PyTorch for CUDA 13.3
    - backport pytorch/pytorch#180996
- patch ONNXRuntime for CUDA 13.3
    - backport part of microsoft/onnxruntime#28736 from the main branch
    - patch Abseil to workaround NVIDIA bug #6302392, based on microsoft/onnxruntime#28586
title: Update CUDA to version 13.3.0
